+# Design Spec: Task Priority Field
+
+**Date:** 2026-03-29
+**Branch:** `feat/42-add-priority`
+**Approach:** B — Explicit priority as a first-class field on Task
+
+## Context
+
+The current codebase has a `derivePriority` function in `src/utils/format-task.ts` that infers priority from status (`in_progress` → high, everything else → medium). This is incomplete — it never returns `'low'`, ignores user intent, and couples priority to status.
+
+Approach B replaces this derived heuristic with an explicit `priority` field on the Task model, set by the user at creation time and updatable independently of status.
+
+---
+
